particulars.description: Charge by way of legal mortgage over the f/h property k/a 595D stockport road, longsight, manchester, title no. GM547319 fixed charge all buildings & other structures fixed to the property, fixed charge any goodwill relating to the property, fixed charge all plant machinery & other items affixed to the property. For more details please refer to clause 3.2 of the instrument.

F/H property k/a 595D stockport road longsight manchester t/no GM547319 fixed charge all buildings & other structures fixed to the property, fixed charge any goodwill relating to the property, fixed charge all plant machinery & other items affixed to the property. Assignment of the rental sums together with the benefit of all rights & remedies fixed charge the proceeds of any claim made under insurance policy relating to the property. Floating charge all unattached plant machinery, chattels & goods on or used in connection with the property or the business or undertaking at the property.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee on any account whatsoever
